title: Skippr AI: The live AI employee inside your product, serving every user | Product Hunt
excerpt: Real-time agents that see, talk, and operate software. They onboard, activate, and unblock your users. On their own. Skippr agents keep agenda and memory across full sessions, speak 10 languages, and act on screen with built-in browser automation. Fully self-serve: spin up an agent in minutes, embed with 2 lines of code, or share a meeting link. Trained on your knowledge, styled to your brand. 200 free credits to start, no card required. Talk to me for the deeper enterprise version.

sentences.en: Real-time agents that see, talk, and operate software.
sentences.zh: 实时代理可以查看、交谈和操作软件。

sentences.en: They onboard, activate, and unblock your users.
sentences.zh: 他们加入、激活和解锁您的用户。

sentences.en: Skippr agents keep agenda and memory across full sessions, speak 10 languages, and act on screen with built-in browser automation.
sentences.zh: Skippr 代理在整个会话中保留议程和记忆，讲 10 种语言，并通过内置浏览器自动化在屏幕上进行操作。

sentences.en: Fully self-serve: spin up an agent in minutes, embed with 2 lines of code, or share a meeting link.
sentences.zh: 完全自助服务：在几分钟内启动代理，嵌入 2 行代码，或共享会议链接。

sentences.en: Trained on your knowledge, styled to your brand.
sentences.zh: 根据您的知识进行培训，根据您的品牌进行设计。

sentences.en: 200 free credits to start, no card required.
sentences.zh: 200 个免费积分即可启动，无需银行卡。

sentences.en: Talk to me for the deeper enterprise version.
sentences.zh: 与我联系以获取更深入的企业版本。

content_html_zh: 实时代理可以查看、交谈和操作软件。 他们加入、激活和解锁您的用户。 靠他们自己。 Skippr 代理在整个会话中保留议程和记忆，讲 10 种语言，并通过内置浏览器自动化在屏幕上进行操作。 完全自助服务：在几分钟内启动代理，嵌入 2 行代码，或共享会议链接。 根据您的知识进行培训，根据您的品牌进行设计。 200 个免费积分即可启动，无需银行卡。 与我联系以获取更深入的企业版本。
